item.description:
### Added - **More in your Codex usage line.** Alongside the 5-hour and weekly limits, Perch now shows your extra-usage **credit balance** and **today's spend** — computed locally, no extra login. Claude shows today's exact spend too.
### Fixed - **Correct Codex weekly limit.** When Codex reports only your weekly window, Perch was labelling it as the 5-hour one. It now identifies each window by its real duration, so the numbers line up with what Codex tells you.
